research.title: Stayin' Aligned Over Time: Towards Longitudinal Human-LLM Alignment via Contextual Reflection and Privacy-Preserving Behavioral Data
research.summary: 【arXiv】Current human-AI alignment and evaluation methods for large language models (LLMs) often rely on preference signals collected immediately after an interaction. This practice implicitly treats preference as static, even though many LLM-mediated decisi
research.title_zh: 随着时间的推移保持一致：通过情境反思和隐私保护行为数据实现纵向人类-LLM一致
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】当前针对大型语言模型（ LLM ）的人工智能对齐和评估方法通常依赖于交互后立即收集的偏好信号。这种做法隐含地将偏好视为静态的，即使许多LLM介导的决定

research.title: Redefining AI Red Teaming in the Agentic Era: From Weeks to Hours
research.summary: 【arXiv】AI systems are entering critical domains like healthcare, finance, and defense, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. While AI red teaming is a primary defense, current approaches force operators into manual, library-specific workflows. Opera
research.title_zh: 重新定义代理时代的人工智能红色团队：从几周到几小时
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】人工智能系统正在进入医疗保健、金融和国防等关键领域，但仍然容易受到对抗性攻击。虽然人工智能红色分组是主要的防御手段，但目前的方法迫使操作员进入手动、特定于库的工作流程。Opera

research.title: Rethinking Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval: Evaluating and Advancing Retrievers in Agentic Search Systems
research.summary: 【arXiv】Reasoning-intensive retrieval aims to surface evidence that supports downstream reasoning rather than merely matching topical similarity. This capability is increasingly important for agentic search systems, where retrievers must provide complementar

research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】推理密集型检索旨在揭示支持下游推理的证据，而不仅仅是匹配主题相似性。这种功能对于代理搜索系统越来越重要，其中检索器必须提供补充

github.title: Sawaira-0316/flight-booking-mcp-server
github.summary: 【GitHub】Local MCP server built with Python + FastMCP that connects Claude AI to a flight booking tool. Search and book flights using natural language. （⭐ 0）

github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Local MCP server built with Python + FastMCP that connects Claude AI to a flight booking tool. Search and book flights using natural language. （⭐ 0）

github.title: Sawaira-0316/language-translator
github.summary: 【GitHub】A local **Model Context Protocol (MCP)** server built with Python and FastMCP. Connects **Claude AI** to a real-time translation engine — translate any text into 100+ languages using natural language  （⭐ 0）

github.summary_en: 【GitHub】A local **Model Context Protocol (MCP)** server built with Python and FastMCP. Connects **Claude AI** to a real-time translation engine — translate any text into 100+ languages using natural language  （⭐ 0）

models.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
models.summary: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.
models.title_zh: SAP在18个月大的德国人工智能实验室下注11.6亿美元，并对NemoClaw说“是”
models.summary_zh: SAP计划收购德国人工智能初创公司Prior Labs ，并投入巨资。它还禁止客户的代理使用像Nvidia的NemoClaw这样的少数产品。
models.title_en: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
models.summary_en: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

models.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
models.summary: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.
models.title_zh: Altara获得了700万$的资金，以弥补拖慢物理科学发展的数据鸿沟
models.summary_zh: Altara的人工智能旨在通过跨电子表格和遗留系统统一孤立的数据来诊断故障并帮助加快研发速度。
models.title_en: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
models.summary_en: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

models.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
models.summary: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.
models.title_zh: 苹果计划让iOS 27成为人工智能模型的“选择你自己的冒险”
models.summary_zh: 据报道，通过Apple最新的操作系统更新，用户可以选择要用于许多任务的第三方AI模型。
models.title_en: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
models.summary_en: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

models.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
models.summary: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dre
models.title_zh: ASML首席执行官Christophe Fouquet谈其公司的垄断地位：没有人会来找我们
models.summary_zh: Christophe Fouquet在公司工作十多年后于2024年成为ASML的首席执行官，周二早上在他的比佛利山庄酒店的屋顶平台上与这位编辑坐下来，然后他将出席Milken Institute全球会议。DRE

models.summary_en: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dre
